---
name: Template project
about: Report something broken
title: "[PROJECT]: Your title here"
labels: project
assignees: ""
---

Project Leader(s): [Name], [Email]

Project Description: Provide a concise summary of the project. Include the main objective, the context or background information, and the significance of the project.

Ideal Participant Characteristics: List the skills and knowledge that the ideal participant might possess. Be specific about technical expertise, programming languages, or other relevant qualifications. (Remember, the hackathon is inclusive, and those without these specific skills are still encouraged to participate and can contribute in various ways.)

Resources: Identify the resources relevant to the project. This can include:

Libraries/Software: List any specific libraries or software tools that will be used.
Data: Mention any datasets that will be used, including where they can be accessed if applicable.
Hardware: Specify any particular hardware requirements.
First Tasks and Issues: List the first tasks and issues that you plan to work on. Suggested format:

[First Task]:
Goal: Describe the goal of this task.
Steps: Outline the actions needed to accomplish this task.

[Second Task]:
Goal: Describe the goal of this task.
Steps: Outline the actions needed to accomplish this task.

...

Any other information: Add any additional information that you would like participants to know.
